records.description: npm operation not permitted — typically cache corruption or cross-user ownership; redirect cache and prefix

shortest_verification.command: mkdir -p /tmp/_polaris_repro_eperm && chmod 000 /tmp/_polaris_repro_eperm && node -e "require('fs').writeFileSync('/tmp/_polaris_repro_eperm/test','x')" 2>&1; chmod 755 /tmp/_polaris_repro_eperm; rm -rf /tmp/_polaris_repro_eperm || true
